detectors.description:
Reentrancy in AutistInu._transfer(address,address,uint256) (AutistInu.sol#707-839):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (AutistInu.sol#779)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (AutistInu.sol#853-865)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (AutistInu.sol#785)
		- _developmentAddress.transfer(amount.div(2)) (AutistInu.sol#873)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount.div(2)) (AutistInu.sol#875)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (AutistInu.sol#837)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (AutistInu.sol#1003)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (AutistInu.sol#983)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (AutistInu.sol#985)
	AutistInu._rOwned (AutistInu.sol#343) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- AutistInu._takeTeam(uint256) (AutistInu.sol#997-1005)
	- AutistInu._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (AutistInu.sol#957-993)
	- AutistInu.balanceOf(address) (AutistInu.sol#533-537)
	- AutistInu.constructor() (AutistInu.sol#441-497)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (AutistInu.sol#837)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (AutistInu.sol#1011)
	AutistInu._rTotal (AutistInu.sol#355) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- AutistInu._getCurrentSupply() (AutistInu.sol#1161-1173)
	- AutistInu._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (AutistInu.sol#1009-1015)
	- AutistInu.constructor() (AutistInu.sol#441-497)
	- AutistInu.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (AutistInu.sol#629-651)

		- [_rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount)](AutistInu.sol#L985)

	- [AutistInu._transferStandard(address,address,uint256)](AutistInu.sol#L957-L993)

	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](AutistInu.sol#L837)

	[AutistInu._rTotal](AutistInu.sol#L355) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [AutistInu._getCurrentSupply()](AutistInu.sol#L1161-L1173)
	- [AutistInu._reflectFee(uint256,uint256)](AutistInu.sol#L1009-L1015)

	- [AutistInu.tokenFromReflection(uint256)](AutistInu.sol#L629-L651)
